title: Day 3 Lesson 3 ( Video )Asking the maker and the price of an item
html:
Day ３ - Lesson 3

めーかーと　ねだんを　きく = Asking the maker and the price of an item

ばしょ (Location): りさいくるしょっぷ　= Recycle shop

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): きゃく (customer), てんいん (shop assistant)

New words for this lesson are:

れいぞうこ (reezooko) = refrigerator

ちゅうごく (chuugoku) = China

とうしば (Tooshiba) = Toshiba

いくらです か (ikura deska?) = How much is it?

さんまんごせんえん (san man go sen en) = 35,000 yen
